diff: Only an operator with the admin role is able to set the maximum slippage for a pool. To do so, they must call the `setMaxSlippage` function on the Controller contract on mainnet, providing the pool address and the maximum slippage value. Calling this function will carry out the following actions:
- The contract will confirm the admin status of the operator. If the caller does not have the admin role, the transaction will revert.
- The contract will set the maximum slippage for the specified pool.
- The contract will emit a `MaxSlippageSet` event to the blockchain logs.
The function call is as follows:
description: Adds documentation for the Pattern Liquidity Layer, including ALM contract addresses, rate limits, Relayer and Freezer Multisigs, and the Maple syrupUSDC Active Instance.
